seo.title: Kamisato Ayaka Build Guide — GenshinGuide
seo.description: Complete Kamisato Ayaka build guide for Genshin Impact v5.6. Best weapons ranked (Mistsplitter Reforged, Amenoma Kageuchi), optimal artifacts (Blizzard Strayer), team compositions (Freeze), and rotation guide.

tldr_key_stats: CRIT DMG 200%+ · ATK 2000+ · CRIT Rate 30-45% · Q > NA > E
intro: Kamisato Ayaka is the premiere Cryo main DPS: a devastating burst that deals 20 ticks of Cryo DMG, cryo-infused normal/charged attacks after dash, and the best freeze DPS in the game. 4pc Blizzard Strayer gives her 40% free CRIT Rate against frozen enemies, letting you stack CRIT DMG to extreme levels. This guide covers everything you need to build her optimally in v5.6.
weapon_bottom_line: Mistsplitter Reforged is BiS — massive CRIT DMG + Elemental DMG bonus. Amenoma Kageuchi is craftable, solves ER, and is excellent F2P. Finale of the Deep is a strong craftable ATK option.

weapons.name: Mistsplitter Reforged
weapons.notes: Signature. High base ATK + CRIT DMG + Elemental DMG bonus. Made for Ayaka.

weapons.name: Amenoma Kageuchi R5
weapons.notes: Best F2P. Craftable. Restores energy after burst — solves ER completely.

weapons.name: Finale of the Deep
weapons.notes: Craftable. High ATK bonus. Good F2P option if not needing Amenoma's energy.

weapons.name: Blackcliff Longsword
weapons.notes: Starglitter shop. CRIT DMG stat stick. ATK passive on kills.

artifact_alt: None — 4pc Blizzard Strayer is mandatory for freeze Ayaka. The 40% free CRIT Rate is too valuable to give up.

main_stats.sands_note: Always ATK%. Ayaka needs 2000+ ATK. ER from subs (130-140%).
main_stats.goblet_note: Always Cryo DMG — her entire kit is Cryo.
main_stats.circlet_note: CRIT DMG circlet. Blizzard gives 40% free CRIT — only need 30-45% from subs.

sub_priority: CRIT DMG (as high as possible — 200%+ is the target)
ATK% (Ayaka needs 2000+ ATK — don't neglect it)
Energy Recharge (130-140% — Amenoma lowers this to ~110%)
CRIT Rate (only to ~35% — Blizzard gives 40% vs frozen)

teams.name: Team 1: Premium Freeze
teams.desc: Ayaka + Kokomi + Kazuha + Shenhe. The best Ayaka team. Kokomi provides AoE Hydro for permafreeze. Kazuha groups + buffs Cryo DMG. Shenhe provides massive Cryo flat DMG bonus.

teams.name: Team 2: Budget Freeze
teams.desc: Ayaka + Mona + Sucrose + Diona. F2P-friendly. Mona buffs DMG via Omen. Diona provides shield + Cryo resonance + battery. Sucrose for grouping and Thrilling Tales buff.

teams.name: Team 3: Mono Cryo
teams.desc: Ayaka + Shenhe + Kazuha + Layla. For unfreezable enemies (bosses). Full Cryo shred + buffing. Layla provides strong shield and Cryo resonance.

rotation_code: Shenhe E Q → Kazuha E Q → Kokomi E → Ayaka dash (cryo infusion) → NA1 (apply cryo) → E → Q → NA spam
mistakes: ❌ Too much CRIT Rate. Blizzard Strayer gives 40% free CRIT vs frozen enemies. Only build 30-45% CRIT Rate. Anything above 45% is wasted.
❌ Not using dash for cryo infusion. Ayaka's dash applies cryo to her attacks. Without it, she deals physical damage. Always dash before your rotation.
❌ Burst missing enemies. Unfrozen enemies can walk out of her burst. Always freeze first, then Q. Use Kazuha/Sucrose to group enemies before bursting.
❌ Building EM. Ayaka is a freeze DPS — she doesn't melt. EM does nothing for freeze. Stack ATK% and CRIT DMG instead.

Total Burst DMG (20 ticks): ███,███ ← Unlock Optimizer: "ATK% circlet vs CRIT DMG circlet: CD wins by +8.7% when ATK > 2000" ► Full simulation: 20 burst ticks · Blizzard CRIT calc · freeze uptime → Pro
artifact_why: 4-Piece Blizzard Strayer is the optimal set for Ayaka.
